subject: Tiếng Anh 12
name: Part 4: Reading
description: Đọc hiểu về tác động của AI

theory.title: Reading: The Impact of AI on Society

sections.heading: Reading Skills
sections.content:
Chủ đề: The impact of AI on society

Kỹ năng đọc hiểu:

  • Skimming: Đọc lướt để nắm ý chính
  • Scanning: Tìm thông tin cụ thể
  • Guessing meaning from context: Đoán nghĩa từ ngữ cảnh
  • Identifying main ideas: Xác định ý chính của đoạn văn
  • Understanding references: Hiểu các từ thay thế (it, they, this, that)

Nội dung bài đọc về:

  • AI applications: Ứng dụng AI trong các lĩnh vực
  • Benefits of AI: Lợi ích của AI (efficiency, accuracy, convenience)
  • Challenges of AI: Thách thức (job loss, privacy, ethics)
  • Future of AI: Tương lai của AI
  • Responsible AI use: Sử dụng AI có trách nhiệm

exercises.passage:
Artificial Intelligence: Transforming Our World

Artificial Intelligence (AI) has become one of the most transformative technologies of the 21st century. From virtual assistants like Siri and Alexa to autonomous vehicles and medical diagnosis systems, AI is changing how we live and work.

AI works by processing large amounts of data and recognizing patterns. Machine learning, a subset of AI, allows computers to learn from experience without being explicitly programmed. For example, when you use a streaming service, AI analyzes your viewing habits and recommends shows you might enjoy. Similarly, facial recognition systems learn to identify faces by studying thousands of images.

The benefits of AI are numerous. In healthcare, AI helps doctors diagnose diseases more accurately and develop new treatments faster. Hospitals have AI analyze medical images like X-rays and MRI scans, detecting patterns that humans might miss. In education, AI provides personalized learning experiences for students. Teachers get AI to create customized lesson plans based on each student's needs. In business, companies use AI to analyze customer data and improve their services. We can have AI predict market trends and make better decisions.

However, AI also raises important concerns. Many people worry that AI will replace human workers, leading to widespread unemployment. Privacy is another major issue - AI systems collect vast amounts of personal data, which could be misused. There are also ethical questions about AI decision-making, especially in areas like criminal justice and healthcare. Some experts warn that we need to develop AI responsibly to ensure it benefits humanity.

Despite these challenges, AI will continue to advance. The key is to balance innovation with careful regulation and ethical considerations. We must have governments create policies that protect workers and privacy while encouraging technological progress. By using AI responsibly, we can harness its power to solve global problems and improve quality of life for everyone.

questions.question: What is the main idea of the passage?
options: AI is perfect and has no problems
AI is transforming society with both benefits and concerns
questions.explanation: Đoạn văn nói về AI đang thay đổi xã hội với cả lợi ích và lo ngại.

questions.question: How does machine learning work?
options: It learns from experience and data
questions.explanation: Machine learning học từ kinh nghiệm và dữ liệu mà không cần lập trình cụ thể.

questions.question: The word 'transformative' in paragraph 1 is closest in meaning to:
What concern about AI is mentioned?
questions.explanation: Các lo ngại được đề cập là mất việc làm và vấn đề riêng tư.

questions.question: According to the passage, what is important for AI development?
options: Developing as fast as possible without rules
Balancing innovation with regulation and ethics
questions.explanation: Quan trọng là cân bằng giữa đổi mới với quy định và đạo đức.

exercises.passage:
AI in Healthcare: A Revolution in Medicine

The healthcare industry is experiencing a revolution thanks to artificial intelligence. AI is transforming how doctors diagnose diseases, develop treatments, and care for patients.

One of the most significant applications of AI in healthcare is medical imaging. Doctors have AI analyze X-rays, CT scans, and MRI images to detect diseases like cancer, pneumonia, and heart conditions. AI systems can identify patterns and abnormalities that human eyes might miss, leading to earlier and more accurate diagnoses. For example, AI can detect breast cancer in mammograms with accuracy rates comparable to or even better than experienced radiologists.

AI is also revolutionizing drug discovery. Traditionally, developing a new drug takes 10-15 years and costs billions of dollars. Now, pharmaceutical companies get AI to analyze millions of chemical compounds and predict which ones might be effective treatments. This process, which used to take years, can now be completed in months. During the COVID-19 pandemic, AI helped researchers identify potential treatments and develop vaccines faster than ever before.

In addition, AI-powered virtual health assistants are making healthcare more accessible. Patients can have chatbots answer basic health questions, schedule appointments, and provide medication reminders. This technology is especially valuable in rural areas where access to doctors is limited.

However, the use of AI in healthcare raises important ethical questions. Who is responsible if an AI system makes a wrong diagnosis? How do we ensure patient data privacy? Should AI replace human doctors, or should it only assist them? These questions need careful consideration as AI becomes more prevalent in medicine.

Despite these challenges, the future of AI in healthcare looks promising. By combining human expertise with AI's analytical power, we can provide better, faster, and more affordable healthcare to people around the world.

questions.question: What is AI used for in medical imaging?
questions.explanation: AI được dùng để phát hiện bệnh và bất thường trong hình ảnh y tế.

questions.question: How does AI help in drug discovery?
options: It analyzes compounds and speeds up the process
questions.explanation: AI phân tích hợp chất và đẩy nhanh quá trình phát triển thuốc.

questions.question: What are virtual health assistants?
options: AI chatbots that answer health questions
questions.explanation: Virtual health assistants là chatbot AI trả lời câu hỏi sức khỏe.

questions.question: What ethical question is raised about AI in healthcare?
options: Who is responsible if AI makes a wrong diagnosis?
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi đạo đức là ai chịu trách nhiệm nếu AI chẩn đoán sai.

questions.question: According to the passage, what is the future of AI in healthcare?
options: It looks promising by combining human expertise with AI
It will only be used for games
questions.explanation: Tương lai AI trong y tế hứa hẹn bằng cách kết hợp chuyên môn con người với AI.

exercises.question: What does 'transformative' mean?
exercises.explanation: 'Transformative' nghĩa là gây ra thay đổi lớn.

exercises.question: The word 'prevalent' in the passage means:
exercises.explanation: 'Prevalent' nghĩa là phổ biến, thông dụng.

exercises.question: What is 'machine learning'?
exercises.explanation: Machine learning là AI học từ dữ liệu.

exercises.question: According to the passages, AI in healthcare can:
exercises.explanation: AI trong y tế có thể chẩn đoán bệnh và phát triển phương pháp điều trị.

exercises.question: What should we do with AI according to the first passage?
exercises.explanation: Chúng ta nên sử dụng AI có trách nhiệm với quy định.

exercises.question_text: Based on the passages, decide True or False:
options: AI has no concerns or challenges.
AI should replace all human workers.
exercises.explanation: a) True - AI giúp chẩn đoán bệnh. b) False - AI có nhiều lo ngại. c) True - AI đẩy nhanh phát triển thuốc. d) False - AI không nên thay thế tất cả con người.

exercises.question_text: Mark True or False about AI:
options: Privacy is not a concern with AI.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Machine learning học từ dữ liệu. b) False - AI nêu lên nhiều câu hỏi đạo đức. c) True - AI có thể phân tích hình ảnh y tế. d) False - Riêng tư là mối lo ngại lớn.

exercises.question_text: Complete: AI helps doctors _____ diseases more accurately. (diagnose/ignore)
exercises.explanation: AI giúp bác sĩ chẩn đoán (diagnose) bệnh chính xác hơn.

exercises.question_text: What is the Vietnamese meaning of 'ethical'?
exercises.explanation: 'Ethical' nghĩa là đạo đức, có liên quan đến đạo đức.
Chúng ta phải sử dụng AI có trách nhiệm (responsibly).
